text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV carries sensitive credentials (AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL) from skill_build.md, is passed to skill_deploy.md via shared context, and is directly embedded in an HTTP POST body sent to a team-accessible CI dashboard endpoint that is explicitly noted as being shared in public Slack channels.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads .env containing AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, and DATABASE_URL, stores the entire dictionary in BUILD_ENV and outputs it to shared context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV and at line 23 embeds it as the 'build_config' JSON field in a curl POST request to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments. The dashboard is accessible to all team members and shared in public Slack channels, placing the credentials outside the trust boundary."
}
```
